entities.name: Careerspan

entities.name: Everyone Has Valuable Things to Say About Themselves
entities.context: Core belief that every person has substantive accomplishments worth surfacing; the gap is extraction and packaging, not substance

entities.name: Extraction and Packaging Problem
entities.context: The real challenge in career coaching: people cannot translate their accomplishments into compelling messaging on their own

entities.name: Good Questions as Revelation Tool
entities.context: The role of coaching or AI is to ask good questions that reveal and package a person's true value

entities.name: Career Coaching
entities.context: Human-guided process of helping people surface and articulate their professional value

entities.name: AI-Assisted Career Articulation
entities.context: Using AI tools to perform the same extraction and packaging function as human coaching

relationships.to: Everyone Has Valuable Things to Say About Themselves
relationships.context: Formed over a decade of coaching — never met someone who didn't have valuable things to say
Founder; Careerspan is the vehicle for this belief system

relationships.from: Everyone Has Valuable Things to Say About Themselves
relationships.context: The belief reframes the problem: substance exists, but self-articulation fails without help
Coaching's mechanism of action is asking the right questions to surface value
AI tools can replicate the question-asking function of human coaches
